message:
✨ Wire undo/redo into main dashboard + collapse update prereqs (#2261)

1. Dashboard undo/redo: The useDashboardUndoRedo hook from PR #2252
   was only wired into DashboardRuntime and CustomDashboard but not
   the main Dashboard.tsx. Now all card mutations (add, remove,
   configure, resize, reorder, drag, template apply) capture snapshots
   and Undo/Redo buttons appear in the FAB menu. Keyboard shortcuts
   Cmd+Z / Cmd+Shift+Z also work.

2. System Updates: Environment prerequisites section is now collapsible
   (collapsed by default) with a summary line showing pass/fail count.
   Removed GitHub token from prerequisites since it has no effect on
   the update process (only affects API rate limits for display data).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
